title: BudgetPolicy
description: Spec §2a Budget Primitive — three budget scopes (session / framework / global) that stack with tightest-cap-wins semantics; four threshold actions (warn at 50%, downshift at 75%, hitl at 90%, hard-stop at 100%); optional downshift_hook referencing a tool by name. Locked at WI-07 (2026-04-18). v0.1 ships all four actions per §0d release scope matrix.

session_usd_cap.description: Per-session USD cap. Default $5.00 applies when omitted; the framework loader fills this in at framework load time. The runtime evaluates the tightest applicable cap across all three scopes — session, framework, global — and uses that cap for threshold percentage math.

framework_usd_cap.description: Per-framework USD cap. Omitted means no framework-level cap; the long-running framework total is unbounded by this scope and only session + global caps apply.

BudgetActions.title: BudgetActions
BudgetActions.description: Four percent thresholds keyed to the tightest applicable cap. Each action is independently configurable per scope; setting any to null disables it for that scope.

warn_at_percent.description: Threshold at which the runtime emits budget_warn + surfaces a toast notification + shifts the BudgetHeaderBar color toward amber. Default 50.

downshift_at_percent.description: Threshold at which the runtime invokes downshift_hook (model-tier ladder) and emits budget_downshift. Default 75.

hitl_at_percent.description: Threshold at which the runtime triggers on_budget_threshold HITL flow and emits budget_suspended; user approval required to continue. Default 90.

hard_stop_at_percent.description: Threshold at which the runtime emits budget_exceeded + dispatches drone StopProcess for all session-spawned agents (immediate kill). Default 100.

DownshiftHook.title: DownshiftHook
DownshiftHook.description: Hook invoked at downshift_at_percent. The runtime resolves the named tool from the framework's tool registry and dispatches it with the current model + remaining budget; the tool returns the new model name. v0.1 falls back to the hardcoded opus → sonnet → haiku ladder when the named tool is absent (framework tool dispatch lands in M5/M9 generators).

type.description: Hook kind discriminator. v0.1 supports only `tool`; v1.0 may add inline script hooks.

tool_name.description: Tool id from the framework's tool registry.

BudgetScope.title: BudgetScope
BudgetScope.description: Which budget scope tripped a threshold. Carried on every budget event so the renderer can attribute the alert (header bar tooltip; scope badge).
